title: Tulsen Tollett
description: GB international rugby league & union footballer and broadcaster
extract: Tulsen Paul Tollett (born 6 May 1973) is a television presenter and former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. A Great Britain international representative utility back, he played in Australia for Sydney's Penrith Panthers and the Parramatta Eels clubs, before moving to England and playing for the London Broncos.
